headings: c. Summary of the Owner Controlled Insurance Policies.
text: - ii. Application of the OCIP Policies. The OCIP Policies shall apply only to those operations of  each  Enrolled  Party  performed at  the  Project  Site  in connection with the Work, and only to Enrolled Parties. An Enrolled Party's operations away from the Project Site are not covered by the OCIP Policies, unless  the  OCIP  Policies  have  been  specifically  amended  or  written  to provide for coverage for such 'off -site' operations .  The OCIP Policies shall not apply to the operations of any Enrolled Party away from the Project Site.
